course_title: American Sign Language (ASL) for Beginners II
description:
Offered: Spring
This course emphasizes visual readiness skills and conversational skills by utilizing grammatical principles, language functions, and cultural behaviors. Students explore the functions of language and identify cultural behaviors characteristic of deaf people. Students increase their fluency in American Sign Language, learning to describe behavior,make requests, and give directions.
Prerequisite(s): ASL 1000 or permission of instructor
Meets General Education Requirement(s): DP
